Accueil.titre: Your catering and ready meals option in downtown
Accueil.bistro-description:
Having completed his apprenticeship in French cuisine, but without ever denying his deep American inspirations, our chef creates menus inspired by the seasons and the local products available. 
Savor our dishes prepared to take away while enjoying our bistro for dinner. Once the work is finished, come and complete your grocery shopping with our range of entirely Quebec products so that you only have to worry about enjoying the aperitif.

Compte.bienvenue: Welcome to La faim des temps
Compte.enspas: Ensure your account is using a long, random password to stay secure.

Menu.sous-titre: Save time and energy with our ready to heat up meals delivered to your homes!
Menu.recuperer: TWO WAYS TO COLLECT YOUR ORDER
Menu.livr-p: A different menu every Friday morning; Simply contact us by email or via our website to place your order and receive the dishes you want in the portions you want. An excellent way to save time, energy and avoid waste (yes, we do see your old carrots begging you not to order pizza).
Menu.livr-heure: The next home delivery will be between 3:00 p.m. and 6:00 p.m. on Friday,
Menu.livr-titre-autre: Delivery fees Fleurimont and Rock Forest zones
Menu.livr-info: Please leave an appropriately sized cooler visible outside for your order.
Menu.venir-p: You can also come to the store between 4:00 p.m. and 5:00 p.m. to collect your order on site. Take the opportunity to pick up something for an aperitif when you get home from our choices of fine charcuterie.

Avis.avisDesc: Your opinion is important for us. Do not hesitate to share your experience with us and with the other users of our website!
Avis.submitted: Your review has been submitted! It will appear on the home page soon.

Valeurs.firstSectionText: From the beginning, we have always sought to integrate as many good environmental practices as possible into our operations, for the simple reason that it aligns with the core values of our founders. You can’t eat well with land that’s overexploited and polluted... hello tester
Valeurs.secondSectionText: Being mindful of our environment and aware that a food business can quickly produce a lot of waste, we have implemented several strategies to minimize our environmental footprint as much as possible.
Valeurs.thirdSectionText1: Our partners are mostly from Sherbrooke... or Quebec (we love Île d'Orléans a bit too much to go without it). Moreover, we use local ingredients as much as possible, and our bistro menu changes with the seasons. We also prioritize producers or artisans who are organic/natural.
Valeurs.thirdSectionText2: At La faim des temps, almost everything is recycled or composted. We are very proud that our trash can is the size of a small office paper basket. Our dear customers return the containers from our catering service. These are then cleaned, sanitized, and reused.

Histoire.desc1: After several years maturing in the mind of our chef, Yannick Pellerin, the project took off in 2020 under the name Tri Corvi Traiteur before reaching its final form in 2023. With experience in both the restaurant industry and fine grocery, Yannick had always wanted to bring his two passions together into a single business. It took the union of talents from sometimes very different backgrounds, as well as a good deal of creativity, to bring this vision to life from nothing. We now have the privilege of offering the best of ourselves to the Sherbrooke community.
Histoire.desc2: While searching for a suitable space, downtown naturally stood out as the ideal place to establish ourselves. Long-time admirers of the Centro, our team thrives on the energy and synergy of our fellow entrepreneurs from all fields here.
Histoire.desc3: Throughout this process, we traveled across Quebec to find delicious products to share, but above all, remarkable people to meet and introduce to others. Our criteria remain and will always be the same: to offer you unique, high-quality products from our terroir, crafted by artisans who are mindful of the Nature around them.
Histoire.desc4: Our criteria remain and will always be the same: to offer you unique, high-quality products from our terroir, crafted by artisans who are mindful of the Nature around them.
Histoire.desc5: Executive chef and graduate of Laval’s culinary school, Yannick has been honing his craft in the restaurant industry for nearly 20 years. He began his culinary journey during his studies at Cégep de Sherbrooke (first at the now-closed Placette, then at Café Bla-Bla) before continuing his training in Montreal at various restaurants, and later in fine and large-scale grocery stores, where he gained solid experience as a cheese merchant.
Histoire.desc6: During his culinary studies, he stood out for his love of historical cuisine, exploring medieval Europe and New France to add unique flavors and spice combinations to his chef’s repertoire. Paradoxically, this love for the past resides in a decidedly nonconformist chef who frequently questions his craft. Status quo is not part of Yannick’s vocabulary; he is always seeking new ways to cook, whether it’s grilling or smoking fresh pasta, or finding inspiration in novels and movies rather than cookbooks.
